faqQuestion: Hey, my HOD is on vacation and can't sign my NOC. Can the Training & Placement Officer (TPO) sign it instead?
faqAnswer: Peer: Yes, my TPO signed it and it got approved.

faqQuestion: Do I have to print the NOC and sign it by hand or can I just use a digital signature on the PDF?
faqAnswer: Peer: I think physical sign is needed.

faqQuestion: my exams are starting next week can i get a week off during the internship to prepare?
faqAnswer: Peer: No, they don't allow leave. For individual case-by-case reviews, please raise an official ticket on your samagama.in dashboard or type #escalate in the Yaksha chat to reach an coordinator.

faqQuestion: How much stipend do we get for this? Is there any security deposit?
faqAnswer: Peer: No stipend bro, it is unpaid.

faqQuestion: Will I get a physical certificate shipped to my home address?
faqAnswer: Peer: I think it's digital.

faqQuestion: I see a yellow VINS panel on my result page. Does this mean I am officially selected?
faqAnswer: Peer: Yes, yellow means selected, green is vise.

faqQuestion: Is it possible to change my project after starting Bronze phase?
faqAnswer: Peer: No way, projects are fixed.

faqQuestion: I uploaded my NOC 2 hours ago but it still says 'pending verification'. What should I do?
faqAnswer: Peer: Wait for a day. For individual case-by-case reviews, please raise an official ticket on your samagama.in dashboard or type #escalate in the Yaksha chat to reach an coordinator.

faqQuestion: What is Rosetta and is it compulsory to write in it daily?
faqAnswer: Peer: Yes it is compulsory.

faqQuestion: Can I write my Rosetta journal using AI like ChatGPT to summarize my work?
faqAnswer: Peer: Don't do that, they have detectors.

faqQuestion: What happens if I miss a live session in Phase 1?
faqAnswer: Peer: You lose points.

faqQuestion: Can I form a team with my friends from the same college?
faqAnswer: Peer: No, teams are randomized.

faqQuestion: My login for ViBe LMS is not working. It says user not found.
faqAnswer: Peer: Use the email where you got the selection mail. For individual case-by-case reviews, please raise an official ticket on your samagama.in dashboard or type #escalate in the Yaksha chat to reach an coordinator.

faqQuestion: Does VINS offer internship extensions if we need more time to finish the project?
faqAnswer: Peer: 1 month grace is allowed.

faqQuestion: Can I talk to my mentor directly on WhatsApp?
faqAnswer: Peer: No, only Slack or Discord.

faqQuestion: If I get selected, do I get the offer letter on my email?
faqAnswer: Peer: No, download it from dashboard.

faqQuestion: Is there any grade report along with the internship certificate?
faqAnswer: Peer: Yes, it shows your scores.

faqQuestion: I forgot to upload the NOC and the deadline has passed. Can I still upload it?
faqAnswer: Peer: Yes, there is no calendar deadline, but your start will be delayed. For individual case-by-case reviews, please raise an official ticket on your samagama.in dashboard or type #escalate in the Yaksha chat to reach an coordinator.

faqQuestion: Can dual degree students get the NOC signed by their PG department instead of UG?
faqAnswer: Peer: Yes, either is fine.

faqQuestion: I want to take leave for 2 days for my sister's wedding next week. Is it possible?
faqAnswer: Peer: No leave allowed. For individual case-by-case reviews, please raise an official ticket on your samagama.in dashboard or type #escalate in the Yaksha chat to reach an coordinator.

faqQuestion: What is the difference between Gold and Platinum badges?
faqAnswer: Peer: Gold is for features, Platinum is lab visit.

faqQuestion: How do we get assigned to projects? Is it based on our resume?
faqAnswer: Peer: Based on your training scores.

faqQuestion: Does anyone know if we need a high-end laptop for the AIML projects?
faqAnswer: Peer: I think basic laptop is fine since we do training on cloud.

faqQuestion: Is it possible to complete the internship in 1 month if we work double time?
faqAnswer: Peer: No, 2 months is minimum.

faqQuestion: I have an exam on June 15th. Can I submit my project a week early and leave?
faqAnswer: Peer: No, early exit is not allowed. For individual case-by-case reviews, please raise an official ticket on your samagama.in dashboard or type #escalate in the Yaksha chat to reach an coordinator.

faqQuestion: proctoring strict
faqAnswer: Peer: yes

faqQuestion: My teammate is doing literally nothing on the codebase for the past week. Can you please change my team?
faqAnswer: Peer: You should talk to your mentor. For individual case-by-case reviews, please raise an official ticket on your samagama.in dashboard or type #escalate in the Yaksha chat to reach an coordinator.

faqQuestion: I started the cohort on May 20 but my college announced exams starting June 5. Can I shift to the July batch?
faqAnswer: Peer: You'll be relieved and deferred. For individual case-by-case reviews, please raise an official ticket on your samagama.in dashboard or type #escalate in the Yaksha chat to reach an coordinator.

faqQuestion: Can I do the whole VINS coding and submissions from my phone? My laptop screen is cracked.
faqAnswer: Peer: No way, coding on phone is impossible.

faqQuestion: I got a proctoring alert because my brother walked in during the quiz. Will I get suspended?
faqAnswer: Peer: TAs review it. If it was a mistake it's fine. For individual case-by-case reviews, please raise an official ticket on your samagama.in dashboard or type #escalate in the Yaksha chat to reach an coordinator.

faqQuestion: What happens if we submit our Phase 1 task late? Do we lose Spurti Points?
faqAnswer: Peer: Yes, SP goes down for late submissions.

faqQuestion: Does VINS provide a Letter of Recommendation (LOR) for job search after completion?
faqAnswer: Peer: Yes, mentors write them.

faqQuestion: Can I update Rosetta once in a week? I find it hard to write daily.
faqAnswer: Peer: No, daily update is checked by system.

faqQuestion: My selection panel is showing selection-in-progress for 3 days. Am I rejected?
faqAnswer: Peer: Ask Yaksha. For individual case-by-case reviews, please raise an official ticket on your samagama.in dashboard or type #escalate in the Yaksha chat to reach an coordinator.

faqQuestion: My mentor has not responded to my queries on Slack for 48 hours. What should I do?
faqAnswer: Peer: Mentors are busy, check with TA. For individual case-by-case reviews, please raise an official ticket on your samagama.in dashboard or type #escalate in the Yaksha chat to reach an coordinator.

faqQuestion: Is the final demo presentation evaluated by IIT Ropar professors directly?
faqAnswer: Peer: Yes, Sudarshan Iyengar and other professors evaluate it.
